content: The 2025 state-of-the-art active learning memory agent can be reframed as a recursive self-improving meta-agent that continuously audits and prunes its own active learning data selection pipeline, using its long-term episodic memory of past query performance to optimize future query selection far better than static curiosity-driven heuristics.
source_topics: active learning memory agent SOTA deep 2025
trigger_topic: active learning memory agent SOTA deep 2025
